positive: Minimalist illustration of a cosmic sloth surrounded by bioluminescent nebula flora, floating in deep space. The sloth should have a serene, contemplative expression and a stylized, friendly silhouette. The background is a gradient of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and magenta, accented by delicate bursts of emerald and gold light. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use clean vector lines, flat graphic design aesthetics with subtle gradients, and high contrast for visual pop. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0 --style raw
